column3: Note: Following a critical later review from the second coder, subsequently reviewed at a further team meeting, we concluded that the original assessment and letter sent for this trial were inappropriately generous, and that there were many more prespecified outcomes that were not reported. No further letter was sent, as NEJM have rejected all letters. The original letter is posted on COMPare site. This assessment sheet therefore reflects the final coding.
